*   **Fig. 1 Siemens DLE combustor construction:**
    *   Double Skin Impingement Cooled Combustor
    *   Main Burner
    *   Pilot Burner
    *   PreChamber
    *   Radial Swirler
    *   Inlet
    *   Combustor
    *   Transition Duct
    *   Exhaust

*   **Fig. 3 Siemens DLE combustion concept:**
    *   Fuel and air mixture entering from the swirler
    *   External recirculation
    *   Main fuel
    *   Pilot fuel
    *   Internal recirculation
    *   Reaction Zone
    *   Combustion air

*   **Fig. 4 Conceptual details of fuel injectors and air paths:**
    *   Air
    *   Pilot Gas Injection
    *   Igniter
    *   Main Gas Injection
    *   Main Liquid Injection
    *   Pilot Liquid Injection

**5. Key Numbers, Constants, Parameters**:

*   15% O2
*   SGT-100, SGT-200, SGT-300, SGT-400 engines.
*   SGT-100, SGT-300, and SGT-400 have 6 combustors per engine, and the SGT-200 has 8.
*   Wobbe index range: 4 MJ/m³ to 70 MJ/m³
*   Siemens standard DLE Combustion System: Wobbe index 37 MJ/m³ to 49 MJ/m³
*   SGT-300 (Libya): Wobbe index ~32 MJ/m³
*   SGT-400 (Yadana, Andaman Sea): Wobbe index 28 MJ/m³
*   SGT-400 (Kandhkot, Pakistan): Wobbe index 32 MJ/m³

**1. Mathematical Equations:**

*   P(of k from n) = P₁ᵏ(1-P₁)^(n-k) n! / [(n-k)! k!]

**2. Graphs/Charts:** NO_VISUAL_CONTENT

**3. Tables:**

*   **Table 1: The comparison of fuel properties of biodiesel with those of diesel**

    | Property                         | Diesel | Biodiesel |
    | :------------------------------- | :----- | :-------- |
    | Low heating value (MJ/kg)       | 42.397 | 37.414    |
    | Density at 15°C (kg/m³)         | 867.8  | 832.2     |
    | Carbon (% mass)                 | 87.1   | 76.8      |
    | Hydrogen (% mass)               | 12.7   | 12.1      |
    | Oxygen (% mass)                 | 0.0    | 10.6      |
    | Nitrogen (mg/kg)                | 335.0  | 25.0      |
    | Kinematic viscosity at 40°C (mm²/s) | 3.45   | 4.91      |
    | Kinematic viscosity at 50°C (mm²/s) | - | 2.67 |

**4. Diagrams:** NO_VISUAL_CONTENT

**5. Key Numbers, Constants, Parameters:**

*   Maximum pressure: 20 bar
*   Maximum temperature: 873 K
*   Maximum air mass flow rate: 5 kg/s
